English: Celebrate Wikipedia's 25th birthday by joining the 25-day reading challenge!
Translation: Raikan hari jadi ke-25 Wikipedia dengan menyertai cabaran membaca selama 25 hari!

English: Read 1 article a day for 25 days
Translation: Baca 1 laman rencana setiap hari selama 25 hari

English: Join the challenge anytime between 1 May and 31 May, complete your 25 days on your own timeline.
Translation: Sertai cabaran ini pada bila-bila masa antara 1 Mei hingga 31 Mei, dan lengkapkan 25 hari mengikut jadual anda sendiri.

English: Complete a 25 day reading streak while the challenge is live to win special prizes
Translation: Lengkapkan cabaran membaca selama 25 hari berturutan untuk memenangkan hadiah yang istimewa.

English: Get helpful reminders and motivation with our adorable birthday mascot Baby Globe
Translation: Dapatkan pengingat dan motivasi dengan maskot hari jadi kami yang comel, Baby Globe.

English: Your reading history is kept protected. Reading insights are calculated using locally stored data on your device.
Translation: Sejarah bacaan anda kekal terlindungi. Analisis mengenai bacaan dikira menggunakan data yang disimpan pada peranti Anda secara tempatan.

English: Log in to join the challenge
Log in or create an account to track your progress towards the reading challenge
Translation: Log masuk atau cipta akaun untuk menjejaki kemajuan anda dalam cabaran membaca.

English: Baby Globe is cheering you on. Add the Reading Challenge widget to track your progress from your homescreen.
Translation: Baby Globe menyokong anda. Tambahkan widget Cabaran Membaca untuk menjejaki kemajuan terus dari skrin utama.

English: A 25-day reading challenge is on the way.
Translation: Cabaran membaca 25 hari akan bermula tidak lama lagi.

English: Join the 25-day challenge and unlock special prizes.
Translation: Sertai cabaran 25 hari dan buka ganjaran istimewa.

English:
Start your reading challenge.
Every streak starts somewhere
Translation:
Mulakan cabaran membaca anda.
Setiap streak bermula dari satu langkah

English: Spin up a new streak? Read one article to get started.
Translation: Mulakan streak baharu? Baca satu artikel untuk bermula.

English: A fresh start. Your streak is just one article away.
Translation: Permulaan baharu. Streak anda hanya selangkah lagi.

English: Nicely read. Your streak is going strong.
Translation: Bacaan yang bagus. Streak anda semakin kukuh.

English: One more day of learning. That’s something to be proud of!
Translation: Satu lagi hari pembelajaran. Memang membanggakan!

English: Today’s reading keeps your streak alive.
Translation: Bacaan hari ini mengekalkan streak anda.

English: That’s one more day of discovery in the books.
Translation: Satu lagi hari penemuan berjaya dicatat.

English: Don’t let today drift by, your reading streak is waiting.
Translation: Jangan biarkan hari ini berlalu begitu sahaja, streak bacaan anda sedang menunggu.

English:
Before the day snoozes away…
there’s still time to learn something.
Translation:
Masih ada masa untuk belajar sesuatu…
sebelum hari berakhir.

English: Even a small bit of reading counts towards your goal.
Translation: Walaupun sedikit, bacaan tetap menyumbang kepada matlamat anda.

English: Your streak is just one article away.
Jump in for some reading anytime today.
Translation: Mulakan bacaan pada bila-bila masa hari ini.

English: You completed the challenge and Baby Globe couldn't be prouder. Bask in your achievement with a digital badge for your activity tab.
Translation: Anda telah melengkapkan cabaran ini dan Baby Globe amat berbangga. Nikmati pencapaian anda dengan lencana digital di tab aktiviti.
Rasa ingin tahu memang sesuai dengan anda!

English: Celebrate completing the challenge with 15% off at the Wikipedia Store
Translation: Raikan kejayaan menamatkan cabaran dengan diskaun 15% di Kedai Wikipedia.
